overall.description: A stationary nighttime view of a wet neon-lit cyberpunk city street from the game Cyberpunk 2077. Various futuristic vehicles including a red sports car, green sedan, and white van drive past the fixed camera position on rain-slicked asphalt, reflecting vibrant neon billboards and overhead street lights between towering glass buildings.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a stationary nighttime view of a wet cyberpunk city street illuminated by vibrant neon billboards and overhead LED lighting. A red sports car sits stationary in the foreground with headlights blazing, then accelerates away, leaving the intersection clear.

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed as various futuristic vehicles pass through the neon-lit intersection. A green sedan crosses from left to right while a black luxury car travels in the right lane, their headlights reflecting off the wet pavement between the towering glass buildings.

events.description: teal compact car enters the frame from the left side of the intersection
white delivery van enters from the right and collides with the teal car, pushing it sideways

white delivery van entering from right and colliding with the teal car

segments.scene_description: Traffic flow continues until a teal compact car enters from the left. A white delivery van then enters from the right and collides with the teal car, pushing it sideways in the intersection before continuing forward. The neon-lit urban backdrop remains constant throughout the incident.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective of a rain-slicked cyberpunk intersection that transitions from a moment of stillness into a scene of urban chaos. It begins with a red sports car idling under the glow of vibrant neon billboards before the vehicle accelerates away, leaving the wet asphalt clear. As the intersection opens up, a green sedan and a black luxury car glide through the frame, their headlights casting shimmering reflections across the pavement between towering glass buildings. The flow of traffic then shifts as a teal compact car enters from the left, only to be struck by a white delivery van arriving from the right. This collision pushes the smaller car sideways across the intersection before the van continues forward against the constant, neon-lit urban backdrop.
